title: 決戦！　栄光の勝利をこの手に！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the event race at Tracen Academy
that Carrot Ranger is attending.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm going to get first place and perform
with Carrot Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're gonna be in the race?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yep! Not only that, I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
What? Someone as tiny as you can't possibly win
against big and strong runners!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, there's no way!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second! It's rude to call an ally of justice
tiny!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The size of a person doesn't matter! What matters
is the strength of their heart!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
But if you're small, you're weak, and weaklings
never win! That's what the big kids always—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Look, I don't know what you've been told, but what's important is what you want to be!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger always says, "Anything's possible
as long as you believe!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
My name is Biko Pegasus! And in today's race, I'm
gonna prove to you that anything's possible!

text_block_list.name: Boys
text_block_list.text: Biko... Pegasus...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ugh! I can't break through to the front!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(As much as I hate to admit it, they were right. My
size puts me at a disadvantage...)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(But I've trained so hard to get where I am! I can't
afford to lose now!)

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: R-ruuuuun!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Don't give up, Biko Pegasus!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You two?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: (I almost forgot... I'm not just running for myself!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(I'm running for those who trained together with
me, for those who support me, and for everyone
placing their hopes in me!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(Watch over me, Carrot Ranger! With the
strength of everyone's courage, I'll...)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Graaaah! PEGASUS STRIIIIIKE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race finishes... with Biko Pegasus dashing into
first at the last second!

text_block_list.name: Boys
text_block_list.text: U-um!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you two! Thanks for cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about this morning. The big kids always
make fun of us 'cause we're small...

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
But seeing you run today gave us courage! We
know now what's important is the strength of our
hearts!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text: Yes! That is the way!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: C-Carrot Ranger?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe you've been watching me since this morning...

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
You have nothing to be ashamed of! The way you
encouraged those youngsters is admirable!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess so! Um... I just want to say you're
my hero!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I want to become a hero and give people
courage, just like you did in episode 112!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that warms my heart! You're doing great
work, new hero!
